notes: These are default-parameter baselines, not optimised results. Negative Sharpe is expected on out-of-the-box params and is the starting point for WP-74+ tuning.
PnL is in index points (A$1 per point for IG's Cash A$1 wrapper; FOREX.com's US SP 500 CFD follows similar economics).
5m window is only ~2.5 weeks because FOREX.com caps bar history at ~4000 per request. Extend via time-windowed pagination before drawing strong conclusions.
IG was the intended primary data source but the weekly historical-data allowance was exhausted on 2026-04-19. Re-run baselines against IG once the quota resets to cross-verify with FOREX.com.
